title: UMI Network Interface Object
description: Universal Machine Interface schema for network interface information. One object per active interface.

InterfaceName.description: Human-readable adapter name. Windows: 'Ethernet 2', Linux: 'eth0', macOS: 'en0'.

IPv4Address.description: Primary IPv4 address, or null if none assigned.

IPv6Address.description: Primary IPv6 address, or null if none assigned.

DefaultGateway.description: Default gateway IP, or null if not applicable.

MacAddress.description: MAC address in colon-separated uppercase hex. Normalized from any OS format.

SpeedMbps.description: Link speed in megabits per second, or null if unknown.

DnsServers.description: List of configured DNS server addresses.

BytesSent.description: Total bytes transmitted on this interface since boot.

BytesReceived.description: Total bytes received on this interface since boot.

PacketsSent.description: Total packets transmitted on this interface since boot.

PacketsReceived.description: Total packets received on this interface since boot.

ErrorsIn.description: Total receive errors on this interface.

ErrorsOut.description: Total transmit errors on this interface.
